title: GMS Week 41 - FORUM FUNDAMENTALS!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 16/10/2023
Image reference: 2023-10-16_gms-week-41-forum-fundamentals_img1.jpg
As deals continue to be concluded into Alang, the Indian ship recycling sector remains ona positive footing overall, with Pakistan and (especially) Bangladesh still lagging behind. Despite steel plate prices coming off by about USD 11/Ton and the Indian Rupee weakening marginally over the course of the week, the overall outlook for India still remains positive. Several Ship Recyclers from the sub-continent markets were gathered at the annual Tradewinds Ship Recycling Conference in Singapore this week, as they discussed market sentiments, fundamentals, and the latest regulations moving forward.
